messages.content:
Task Management Application
Develop a task management web application for creating, updating, and tracking tasks.

Key Features:
User authentication & authorization
CRUD operations for tasks
Real-time updates (optional: using WebSockets)
Responsive design for web and mobile screens
Expected Outcome:
Learn full-stack application structure, API integration, and dynamic data handling.

backend/db.js.name: backend/db.js

backend/middleware/auth.js.name: backend/middleware/auth.js

backend/routes/auth.js.name: backend/routes/auth.js

backend/routes/tasks.js.name: backend/routes/tasks.js

backend/index.js.name: backend/index.js
